rules.policy: Every feature starts as passes:false. Only flip to true after a real test run is documented in BOOKING_PROGRESS.md.

features.name: Supabase Auth: customer email magic-link sign-in
Supabase Auth: admin role gate (RLS-enforced)
Guest checkout works without an account
GCal FreeBusy fetch returns busy windows for date range

status.notes: Verified 2026-05-30 via /api/booking/healthcheck against live photospace:studio calendar — returned 2 busy windows in next 24h (real Acuity events).

features.name: Hourly slots respect business-hours config
Multi-day range computes contiguous days correctly
Overnight bookings span midnight without double-counting
Admin manual blocks suppress availability
Buffer minutes before/after enforced

status.notes: Verified 2026-05-30 in slots.test.ts — 10:00-12:00 busy window correctly blocks 7:00-13:00 starts with 2h buffer (a 2-hr booking starting at 7:00 ends at 9:00 which falls within the buffer).

features.name: America/Denver DST transitions handled correctly
Hourly rate × hours computed server-side

status.notes: Verified 2026-05-30 in pricing.test.ts — full Acuity ladder smoke (2-12 hrs, all 11 rungs) matches the canonical price snapshot.

features.name: Half-day flat rate applied

status.notes: Verified 2026-05-30 in pricing.test.ts — 5-hr halfday at $485 base case.

features.name: Full-day flat rate applied

status.notes: Verified 2026-05-30 in pricing.test.ts — 10/11/12-hr fullday all at flat $925.

features.name: Multi-day priced per-day with admin override possible

status.notes: Deferred to Phase 4 (multi-day flow). Domain model only supports single-day bookings in v1.

features.name: Overnight surcharge logic (if any) applied

status.notes: Not in v1 per spec — Acuity has no surcharge; native v1 charges flat hourly. Revisit if business adds surcharge.

features.name: Add-on prices summed server-side

status.notes: Verified 2026-05-30 in pricing.test.ts — multiple add-ons sum to addonsTotalCents and roll into subtotal.

features.name: Member rates applied to logged-in members

status.notes: Verified 2026-05-30 in pricing.test.ts — Spark/Creator/Visionary bucket math: full-coverage (5h Spark on 5h booking → $0), partial-overage (5h Spark on 7h → $130 overage at $65/hr), exhausted-bucket (0h available → all hours overage), add-ons NOT discounted by member status.

features.name: Client-side total is display-only; server is source of truth

status.notes: By construction — pricing engine is a pure server-side function in src/lib/booking/pricing.ts; no client-side recompute path. Will be reaffirmed in webhook handler in Phase 3 (server re-computes before charging).

features.name: Strobe/video/cyc/crew add-ons selectable

status.notes: Catalog complete in src/lib/booking/addons.ts — 14 add-ons matching Acuity verbatim including the resolved 2-tier tech splits (Digital Tech 1-5h $575 / 6-12h $875; Grip/Light Tech 1-5h $475 / 6-12h $675).

features.name: Add-ons can be added/edited/disabled by admin

status.notes: Catalog is currently code-defined. Move to DB + admin UI in Phase 5.

features.name: Add-on availability rules respected (e.g. requires X)

status.notes: addonsForDuration() filters by minHours/maxHours — the two tech tiers correctly hide the wrong tier for the chosen booking length.

features.name: Apply coupon by code at checkout
Percent and fixed discounts both supported

status.notes: Verified 2026-05-30 in pricing.test.ts — FAMTWENTY (20%), FAMFORTY (40%), FAM100 (100%) all compute correctly; fixed-cents coupons capped at subtotal so total never goes negative.

features.name: Expiry + max-uses + per-customer limits enforced
Coupons configurable in admin
Temp hold row created with TTL (e.g. 15 min)
Concurrent hold attempts on same window → exactly one wins
Expired holds auto-released (cron or query-time)
Stripe intent/checkout created with server-computed amount
Webhook signature verified
Webhook confirms booking + finalizes calendar event
Failed/abandoned payment releases hold
Idempotency: replayed webhooks don't double-charge or dup
Refund flow (admin-initiated) returns money via Stripe
Confirmed booking creates GCal event with correct details
Cancellation removes/marks GCal event
Admin edit updates GCal event
GCal sync failure surfaces to admin (alert + retry queue)
Multi-day bookings enter pending_approval
Admin approve/deny notifies customer (email + state change)
Hold extends/expires appropriately during approval window
Policy acceptance required and recorded before payment
Intake fields collected per appointment type
Customer confirmation email on confirm
Admin notification email on confirm
Reminder email ~24h before booking
Cancellation email to customer + admin
Admin route gated by role; non-admin → 404/302
Bookings table with filters (status, date, customer)
Manual block create/edit/delete
Add-on + pricing management UI
Coupon management UI
Approve/deny pending requests
Audit log for admin actions
RLS: customers see only their own bookings
Service-role key never in client bundle

status.notes: By construction — supabaseAdmin, coupons, member-hours, availability, and google/calendar all import 'server-only' which fails the build if any client module imports them. Will reverify with a `grep -r NEXT_PUBLIC_` of the build output before public launch.

features.name: Webhook endpoint rejects unsigned/invalid requests
PII redacted from logs
Pricing endpoints rate-limited / bot-gated
Booking flow keyboard-navigable end to end
Form errors announced via aria-live
Calendar grid has accessible labels + roving tabindex
≥5 real end-to-end bookings via native flow while Acuity live
Zero double-bookings observed in parallel-test window
All confirm/cancel emails delivered in parallel-test window
